title: papaver alpinum subvar. intermedium
intro: Papaver alpinum subvar. intermedium, also known as Alpine poppy, is a subvariety of the Papaver alpinum plant, which is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its alkaloids, including protopine and sanguinarine, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum subvar. intermedium include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, wounds, and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
